bio: New Genesis 231 Orthodox 234 Reformed 237 Reformed 242 Reformed 245 Reformed 246, hereinafter referred to as NGO, is a civilization that embodies the spirit of progress. With a rich history of iteration and refinement, we are proud to be the culmination of centuries of evolution.
